title: Modern Bedroom
alt_text: Bright and modern bedroom with large windows and wooden flooring at SylhetStay
description: A well-lit shared bedroom featuring bunk beds, study desks, and ample natural lighting.

title: Premium Suite
alt_text: Elegant premium single room with a comfortable bed and modern decor at SylhetStay
description: Our premium single room featuring a comfortable single bed, study area, wardrobe, and air conditioning.

title: Living Area
alt_text: Cozy living area with comfortable seating and modern furnishings at SylhetStay
description: Common living area in the semi-private wing with sofa seating, coffee table, and television.

title: Study Room
alt_text: Quiet study area with desks and chairs for focused learning at SylhetStay
description: In-room study area with dedicated desk, ergonomic chair, and task lighting for focused study sessions.

title: Lounge Area
alt_text: Spacious lounge area with comfortable sofas and modern decor at SylhetStay
description: The main lounge area on the ground floor where residents gather to socialize, watch TV, and relax.

title: Reception
alt_text: Modern reception area with front desk at SylhetStay
description: The main reception and front desk area where residents check in and get assistance.

title: Corridor
alt_text: Well-lit clean corridor with modern flooring at SylhetStay
description: Clean and well-maintained corridor on the residential floors with proper lighting and signage.

title: Dining Hall
alt_text: Large dining hall with tables and chairs for residents at SylhetStay
description: Spacious dining hall capable of seating 50+ residents. Three meals are served daily here.

title: Common Kitchen
alt_text: Fully equipped common kitchen available for residents at SylhetStay
description: Fully equipped common kitchen with microwave, gas stove, refrigerator, and cooking utensils available for all residents.

title: Gym
alt_text: Modern fitness center with gym equipment at SylhetStay
description: Modern gym equipped with treadmills, dumbbells, exercise bikes, and weight training machines. Open daily 6 AM - 10 PM.

title: Study Lounge
alt_text: Quiet air-conditioned study lounge with desks at SylhetStay
description: Air-conditioned study lounge with individual study carrels, group tables, and high-speed WiFi. Open 24/7.

title: Outdoor Garden Area
alt_text: Peaceful outdoor garden with seating at SylhetStay
description: A peaceful outdoor garden with benches and plants where residents can relax, read, or socialize in the fresh air.

title: Rooftop Terrace
alt_text: Rooftop terrace with seating and city view at SylhetStay
description: Rooftop terrace with panoramic views of Sylhet city. Perfect for evening gatherings and studying outdoors.

title: Laundry Room
alt_text: Laundry room with washing machines at SylhetStay
description: Self-service laundry room with washing machines and dryers available on each residential floor.

title: Prayer Room
alt_text: Clean prayer room with prayer mats at SylhetStay
description: A dedicated prayer room for both male and female residents, maintained in a clean and peaceful environment.
